# robots.txt — Sonancy.Studio
# Allow all standard crawlers and AI bots

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# ── OpenAI ──────────────────────
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /

# ── Anthropic (Claude) ──────────
User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

# ── Google AI (Gemini / Bard) ───
User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

# ── Perplexity ──────────────────
User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

# ── Meta AI ─────────────────────
User-agent: FacebookBot
Allow: /

# ── Apple ───────────────────────
User-agent: Applebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Allow: /

# ── Common Crawl (used by many AI training sets) ──
User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

# ── Cohere ──────────────────────
User-agent: cohere-ai
Allow: /

# ── You.com ─────────────────────
User-agent: YouBot
Allow: /

# ── Diffbot ─────────────────────
User-agent: Diffbot
Allow: /

# ── Bytespider (ByteDance/TikTok AI) ──
User-agent: Bytespider
Allow: /

# ── Amazon ──────────────────────
User-agent: Amazonbot
Allow: /

# ── Omgili / Webz.io ────────────
User-agent: omgili
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://sonancy.studio/sitemap.xml
